name: ZhongDe Waste Technology AG
summary: ZhongDe Waste Technology AG designs, invests in, constructs, operates, and finances power plants in Germany and China. The company operates through three segments: Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC) Projects; Built, Operate and Transfer Projects; and Incinerators. It operates energy-from-waste incineration plants that generate electricity from the disposal of solid municipal, medical, and industrial waste. The company also provides EPC contractor services, which include design, procurement, construction, and installation of energy-from-waste and incineration plants. ZhongDe Waste Technology AG was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
